top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a2.*
FROM molecule m1
JOIN atom a1 ON m1.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE m1.label = 'TR181';

SELECT DISTINCT a2.*
FROM molecule m1
JOIN atom a1 ON m1.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE m1.label = 'TR181';

SELECT DISTINCT a.atom_id, a.molecule_id, a.element
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON a1.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR181';

SELECT DISTINCT a2.*
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON a1.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR181';

SELECT DISTINCT a2.*
FROM molecule m1
JOIN atom a1 ON m1.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE m1.label = 'TR181';

SELECT DISTINCT a.atom_id, a.molecule_id, a.element
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON a1.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR181';

SELECT DISTINCT a2.*
FROM connected c
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN molecule m ON a1.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR181';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a2.*
FROM molecule m1
JOIN atom a1 ON m1.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE m1.label = 'TR181';
